---
title: ATLAS
alias: &ALIAS atlas
href: https://atlas.pfizer.com/
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

The Antimicrobial Testing Leadership and Surveillance (ATLAS) program is a Pfizer-sponsored global antimicrobial surveillance program tracking resistance trends and susceptibility patterns of clinical isolates.

## Key Features

- Collects clinical isolates from hospitals across more than 60 countries annually
- Tests susceptibility against a broad panel of approved and investigational antimicrobials
- Provides an interactive online portal for querying resistance trends by pathogen, region, and year
- Covers Gram-positive, Gram-negative, and fungal pathogens of clinical importance
- Publishes peer-reviewed analyses of surveillance findings in scientific journals

## Use Cases in Research

- Querying global susceptibility data for specific pathogen-drug combinations to guide clinical research
- Accessing longitudinal resistance trend data for priority pathogens across geographic regions
- Benchmarking novel antibiotic activity against contemporary global clinical isolate datasets
- Integrating ATLAS data with genomic surveillance to link phenotypic and genotypic resistance
- Supporting evidence-based antibiotic stewardship recommendations with population-level surveillance data

## Getting Started

Visit [ATLAS](https://atlas.pfizer.com/) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
